actions-list.actionItem: Pursuant to the order of Wednesday, April 22, 2026,  the Journal of the proceedings of the Senate was deemed approved to date.
Pursuant to the order of Wednesday, April 22, 2026, the morning hour being deemed expired, and the times for the recognition of the two leaders being reserved.
The following transactions of morning business occurred on today.

S.Res. 689 (Sen. Scott, of SC):
        A resolution congratulating the University of South Carolina Aiken women's polo team on winning the 2026 United States Polo Association Division I Women's National Intercollegiate Championship.

        -- Submitted in the Senate, considered, and agreed to without amendment and with a preamble by Unanimous Consent.

PN730-14:
        Robert Cekada, of Florida, to be Director, Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms, and Explosives

        -- Considered by Senate.

        -- By unanimous consent agreement, mandatory quorum required under Rule XXII waived.

        -- Cloture invoked in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 54 - 37. Record Vote Number: 106 


        -- By unanimous consent agreement, vote to be determined.
By unanimous consent, on the request of Mr. Hagerty, at  7:21 p.m., the Senate adjourned, under its order of today, until 10 a.m. tomorrow.
